Object.Name: Calendar

Item.Name: MaxNumberOfTasksPerDay
Item.Description: Max number of tasks per day

Object.Description2:
The Calendar handles mowing tasks. Use this module to control at what times and what week days the mower shall be active.
## Task handling Tasks can be added, modified and deleted. They are accessed using task indexes, which will always be in and uninterrupted range from 0 to number of tasks.
Note! An index of a task is not constant, if a task is deleted the other tasks may have updated indexes. I.e., there is no point in remembering an index of a task for later usage, since it may have been updated.
## Task transaction If several modifications to the Calendar shall be done at one instance, a transaction shall be used. After a call to StartTransactions, all modifications are done in a sand box until CommitTransaction is performed. If a transaction is not used for 2s, it is discarded.
